name: Quebec Maple Syrup Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the maple syrup, cream, flour, and eggs until blended.
2. Stir in the nuts (if using).
3. Pour the mixture into the pie crust.
4. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
5. Reduce the temperature to 350°F and bake for an additional 30-35 minutes, or until set.
6. Let cool on a rack.
